title: Farming statistics: livestock populations at 1 December 2017 – England
body: "This publication gives statistics on the number of cattle, sheep and pigs in England at 1 December 2017.  The dataset associated with this publication can be found here.  Next update: see the statistics release calendar   Defra statistics: farming     Email farming-statistics@defra.gov.uk      You can also contact us via Twitter: https://twitter.com/DefraStats    "
